scope: wave2 fan-out migration: 2 of 3 legacy-parity read streams (api_keys, index_settings); the indices stream is blocked (ENGINE_GAP, see docs.md) and index records/search, ACL mutation, and analytics endpoints are out of scope until Pass B

excluded.reason: ENGINE_GAP: legacy's indices listing starts at page 0 (0-based paging), but the engine's page_number paginator (connsdk.PageNumberPaginator.Start) unconditionally coerces StartPage==0 to 1 (cannot distinguish an explicit start_page:0 from an unset zero-value int), so every live read would silently skip the real first page's records -- an accepted-input data change, not a cosmetic deviation. See docs.md's Known limits.
API key creation is an admin mutation, not a read stream
API key deletion is a destructive admin action
